What did he do there?

At Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), Bengaluru, Abhay:
*   "Designed and implemented algorithms to classify flying objects (missile, satellite, aircraft, unknown) using Belief Theory (Transferable Belief Model)."
*   "Worked extensively on radar trajectory data processing, trajectory modeling, feature extraction, and uncertainty handling using MATLAB and Python."
*   "Improved classification robustness through belief mass function modeling and force-based trajectory analysis."

At Bharat Electronic Limited (BEL), Bengaluru, Abhay:
*   "Applied machine learning techniques to solve leaf disease detection, working on data preprocessing, model development, and evaluation pipelines."
*   "Gained hands -on exposure to software development workflows in an R&D environment, strengthening analytical thinking, problem-solving, and collaborative development skills."
for how long he has done it?

Abhay interned at:
*   Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), Bengaluru from "Feb 2025 - May 2025".
*   Bharat Electronic Limited (BEL), Bengaluru from "Oct 2023 - Nov 2023".

Summarize my resume

Abhay G Moudhgal is a highly motivated AI enthusiast with a strong foundation in machine learning and software development. He is pursuing an M.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering from PES University (2025-2027, CGPA: 9.45) and holds a B.E in Computer Science & Engineering from SJB Institute of Technology (2021-2025, CGPA: 9.17).

He has published "Land Registry using Blockchain" in the CIACON 2025 Conference, IEEE.

**Experience:**
*   **Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), Bengaluru (Feb 2025 - May 2025):** Interned, designing and implementing algorithms to classify flying objects (missile, satellite, aircraft, unknown) using Belief Theory (Transferable Belief Model). Worked on radar trajectory data processing, trajectory modeling, feature extraction, and uncertainty handling using MATLAB and Python.
*   **Bharat Electronic Limited (BEL), Bengaluru (Oct 2023 - Nov 2023):** Interned, applying machine learning techniques to solve leaf disease detection, focusing on data preprocessing, model development, and evaluation pipelines.

**Projects:**
*   **Leaf Disease Detection:** Developed a deep learning-based CNN model to identify 32 types of leaf diseases, achieving 92% classification accuracy (Python, TensorFlow, Keras, Matplotlib).
*   **Target Classification using Belief Theory:** Designed a radar-based object classification system using Transferable Belief Model (TBM), implementing belief mass functions, trajectory analysis, and force modeling (MATLAB, Python).
*   **Car Hub – Online Car Rental Platform:** Designed and developed a full-stack car rental platform with backend REST APIs and interactive frontend, implementing secure authentication, real-time booking, and an admin dashboard (Flask, React.js, Next.js, Python, REST APIs, MongoDB).

**Technical Skills:** Python, Java, C, Django, Flask, React.js, Next.js, MySql, MongoDB, MATLAB, Jupyter Notebook, Eclipse, Git, Prompt Engineer, Cloud Computing, Block-Chain.
**Soft Skills:** Problem Solving, Analytical Thinking, Teamwork, Communication, Leadership, Adaptability, Strong Work Ethic.
**Certifications & Achievements:** Cloud Computing Foundations Google, AI A-Z Udemy, C Program BALC, Tabala Jr. Hindustani Talavadya Junior Grade.
